home.headline: Fast, clear interfaces with real depth.
home.subtitle: I build modern web experiences with TypeScript, refined motion, and an obsession with performance.
home.featuredSubtitle: A slice of what I'm shipping right now.
home.story1Body: Interfaces that load fast, read cleanly, and still feel special on scroll — without trading away accessibility or SEO.
home.story2Body: TypeScript, React, refined motion, and architecture ready to grow as the product does.

about.title: About
about.body1: I work where code, motion, and visual clarity meet. I like interfaces that feel simple on the surface and stay organized underneath.
about.body2: This portfolio is a living scaffold: i18n, theming, mocked data, and an admin shell ready to plug into a real API.
about.focusText: Lightweight design systems, dashboards, and web products with strong emphasis on accessibility and load time.
